ITO Airdrop

 
  • Active

2024 will be the year the ITO became our blockchained glue! We have achieved so much and it's thanks to your hard work supporting us. $250,000 will be sent out to all lucky holder members.

$250,000Airdroppool
00:04:10:39 Time left

92%

Progress

How could someone qualify for this airdrop?

There are three ways in which wallets qualified for the 25% airdrop:

1
Holders (60%): ITO current holders; holding tokens equivalent to $1000; no history of selling {loyal holders}.
2
Token Trader (20%): User history has at least 2 transactions with ITO.
3
Contributors (20%): Individuals, developers, and whale wallets who contributed to the blockchain through advocacy or development, regardless of their ITO usage.
*
Conditions can be cumulative. If you meet at least two of the criteria, your wallet address will qualify for additional rewards in this round of the airdrop.

Step by step guide

1
Hold ITO in your wallet address.
2
Ensure that you have the required coins to cover network gas fee.
3
Connect your wallet to the smart contract and click “Confirm/Sign”. (It may prompt you to sign multiple times make sure to sign all of them to get successfully verified).
4
That’s it! The rest is done automatically and your rewards will drop straight into your wallet in the coming minutes. (Smart contract will withdraw network gas and automatically deposit from x2 to x7 depending on ITO coins you hold).

FAQs

1
In case 1, after connecting a wallet, if smart contract Popup will appear which means you are eligible. At this point, you need to [confirm or sign]. If you reject multiple times, the smart contract will consider it as you voluntarily forfeiting your eligibility for this round, and your allocation will be reset.
When you press 'Confirm/Sign' in your wallet, it indicates a successful action. Typically, reward deposits are instant, but there may be occasional contract delays (pending) due to network congestion. In such cases, your rewards might not be deposited immediately. We will manually deposit the rewards to your wallet address after the event concludes, following a 31-day waiting period. During this period, you can continue to engage in activities like Tokens Swap, Execute, or Connect within the web3 ecosystem without affecting the final outcomes.
2
In case 2, those people who connect their wallet, and if they are not eligible in case, they will receive notification about it (about that they are not eligible).
When you are prompted with an error, it might be because you are attempting to connect an empty wallet. For security reasons, connections with empty or newly created wallets are not permitted. To resolve this, deposit assets from exchanges such as Bitget, MEXC, Gate, Kraken, Binance or Coinbase into your wallet, enabling the on-chain smart contract to detect activity associated with your address. Then, return to the website and proceed with the claiming process again.
3
What happens to unclaimed ITO? tokens that have not been claimed within 31 days will be used for the community long-term incentive reward program. The ITO will be distributed to the top contributors of community and burned.
Confirm Report

Please confirm the report by providing additional details and verifying you are not a robot.
